---
name: Quire MCP
description: Comprehensive Quire toolset for creating and previewing Quire projects through natural language without terminal knowledge.
---

## Overview
Essential Quire tools and guidance. 
For advanced detail on tools with examples, refer to ./commands 
For help troubleshooting Quire outputs, refer to ./troubleshoot.md

## About Quire
Multiformat publishing tool designed web publications

## Available Tools
***create quire*** - Creates a quire project
***build quire*** - Generates static files for rendering
***preview quire*** - Previews generated files on localhost
***stop preview quire*** - Kills preview


## Guidance
- Ask and confirm project name or project path if not provided or present in context.
- After creating, offer to build immediately.
